prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated TU24 engine (1.4L, 100hp stock) with a forged crankshaft from a Peugeot 106 Rallye (TU3JP 1.6L) and Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (83.5mm bore, 8.2:1 compression ratio) for high-RPM reliability, paired with a custom billet steel connecting rod set from Pauter Machine (H-beam, 137mm center-to-center length) to handle 9,000 RPM safely.

Full titanium valvetrain upgrade: Ferrea Racing titanium intake valves (33.5mm diameter) and exhaust valves (29mm diameter) with single-piece titanium retainers from Supertech Performance, paired with a custom-ground camshaft from Schrick (272° intake, 268° exhaust, 11.5mm lift) and adjustable cam gears from Verus Engineering for precise timing adjustments. Valve springs from PAC Racing (120 lbs/in seat pressure, 350 lbs/in open pressure) with titanium shims to reduce reciprocating mass.

Fuel and ignition system overhaul: Bosch Motorsport 0280155967 high-flow fuel injectors (300cc/min) with a custom fuel rail from Radium Engineering, controlled by a standalone Haltech Elite 1500 ECU. Ignition system upgraded to a 6-channel MSD 6AL-2 CDI box with NGK R7437-9 racing spark plugs (0.6mm gap) and custom 8mm ignition leads from Magnecor. Exhaust system features a 4-2-1 stainless steel header from Janspeed (1.75" primary tubes, 2.5" collector) with a custom 2.5" straight-pipe exhaust and a Scorpion 76mm titanium tip for weight savings.
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using a custom-made Rocket Bunny-style kit from Liberty Walk Japan, specifically designed for the AX GTI's unique chassis dimensions (1,260mm width, 3,500mm length). Kit includes front fenders with integrated vents, rear quarter panels with aggressive flares, and a custom front bumper with a 3D-printed splitter from APR Performance (adjustable for downforce).

Custom suspension geometry with a full coilover setup from Ohlins (Road & Track DFV dampers, 400lb/in front springs, 350lb/in rear springs) paired with custom-made polybushings from SuperPro (front control arm bushings, rear trailing arm bushings) and spherical bearing conversion for the front strut tops (using Rose Joints from Aurora Bearing). Chassis reinforcement includes a custom bolt-in roll cage from Custom Cages UK (T45 steel, 2.5" diameter main hoop) with integrated strut tower braces and a rear shock tower brace from Cusco.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with a full carbon fiber dashboard from V Carbon (matching the AX GTI's unique curved design), Recaro Pole Position seats (fixed-back, carbon fiber shell) with custom mounting brackets, and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (320mm diameter, suede grip) on a NRG Innovations quick-release hub. Gauges upgraded to a digital dash from AIM MXS Strada (1.3" display) with integrated data logging for oil pressure, fuel pressure, and wideband AFR (AEM X-Series sensor).
